channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan Embassy in Washington Holds Ceremony Celebrating Marka-e-Haq and National Unity
item.description: The Pakistan Embassy in Washington held a grand ceremony to mark the first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq, highlighting Pakistan’s unity, resilience, and patriotic spirit. The event saw participation from...

item.title: South Africa’s retail ecosystem: The unseen supply chains and workers behind everyday shopping
item.description: In South Africa, the retail sector is often viewed only through the final customer interaction at the till, but this overlooks a vast hidden economy of workers and systems that keep goods flowing from...

item.title: Saskatoon Kicks Off Annual BYXE Week to Celebrate Cycling
item.description: As spring arrives in Saskatoon, residents are embracing the warmer weather and the city is marking the occasion with its annual BYXE Week. Pronounced 'bikes week,' BYXE Week is a city-wide cycling cel...

item.title: Gor Mahia Needs Six More Points To Clinch Premier League Title
item.description: Gor Mahia managed to secure a late draw against Kenya Police on Sunday, May 10, keeping their title hopes alive in the Kenya Premier League. The result puts K'Ogalo on 65 points, seven ahead of AFC Le...

item.title: Frontier Airlines plane evacuation following runway collision with pedestrian at Denver International Airport
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) is investigating the evacuation of a Frontier Airlines flight after it struck and killed a pedestrian on the runway at Denver International Airport. The...

item.title: Highlights and Key Films at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival
item.description: Di 2026 Cannes Film Festival don start for Cannes, France, and e dey promise plenty action, world premieres, fashion, and party wahala. Twenty-two films dey compete for di prestigious Palme d'Or wey d...

item.title: Iran Submits Formal Reply to Latest U.S. Draft for Ceasefire Negotiations
item.description: Iran has officially submitted its response to the most recent U.S. draft proposal aimed at ending the ongoing war in the region, according to reports from the country's state news agency IRNA. The sub...

item.title: ACM launches Heartbeat of Australia survey to understand community wellbeing
item.description: The Australian Community Media (ACM) and the University of Canberra's News and Media Research Centre have opened the fifth annual Heartbeat of Australia survey. The survey seeks to gather insights on ...

item.title: Jim Chalmers declares housing status quo broken ahead of Federal Budget 2026
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has placed housing at the centre of the Federal Budget 2026, stating that the current status quo is broken, unfair and unacceptable. In interviews and a press conference on Sund...

item.title: Canadians return home following evacuation from MV Hondius amid hantavirus outbreak
item.description: Passengers, including four Canadians, have disembarked from the MV Hondius cruise ship following a hantavirus outbreak that has resulted in three deaths and several infections. The ship, operated by O...

item.title: Planned Power Outages in Kericho and Kwale Counties on Monday, May 11
item.description: Kenya Power and Lighting Company (KPLC) has issued a notice regarding planned electricity interruptions in selected areas of Kericho and Kwale counties on Monday, May 11, 2026. According to the utilit...

item.title: Senator Erwin Tulfo States Changing Senate Leadership Will Not Halt VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: Senator Erwin Tulfo emphasized that a change in the Senate leadership, often referred to as a 'coup,' is not the proper way to address or stop the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. In ...

item.title: Angela Rayner calls for major change in Labour direction after local election losses
item.description: Angela Rayner, who previously served as Deputy Prime Minister, has issued a strongly worded statement following Labour’s significant losses in the local elections. In the statement, she criticises the...

item.title: Step-by-step guide to reversing KPLC tokens sent to the wrong meter
item.description: Buying KPLC prepaid electricity tokens for the wrong meter number is a common issue among users in Kenya, especially with mobile payments like M-Pesa. This guide explains clearly how customers can res...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay resigns from one of his two Assembly seats after taking oath
item.description: In a significant political development in Tamil Nadu, the newly sworn-in Chief Minister Vijay of the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) has resigned from the Tiruchi East Assembly constituency while retai...

item.title: Randeep Singh becomes first Tanzanian to win Uganda NRC and secures podium at Pearl of Africa Rally
item.description: Tanzanian rally driver Randeep Singh has made history by becoming the first Tanzanian to win the Uganda National Rally Championship (NRC). Competing at the 2026 Pearl of Africa Uganda Rally, Randeep s...

item.title: Pakistan Mediates Iran's Response to US Peace Proposal Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif confirmed that Pakistan has officially received Iran's response to a United States peace proposal aimed at ending hostilities in the region. The response was delivered th...

item.title: Six APC Aspirants Withdraw from Kano Central Senatorial Race, Endorse Ibrahim Shekarau for 2027
item.description: In a major political development for Kano State, six aspirants of the All Progressives Congress (APC) for the Kano Central Senatorial seat have stepped down ahead of the 2027 general elections. The as...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh man plans symbolic death ceremony after body donation ridicule
item.description: In Madhya Pradesh, a man who had offered to donate his body for scientific purposes faced ridicule from his local community. Hurt by the mockery and the lack of understanding of his altruistic intenti...

item.title: Kanayo O. Kanayo Urges Africans to Speak Out Against Xenophobia and Support Each Other
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actor Kanayo O. Kanayo don speak up against the recent xenophobic wahala wey dey happen for South Africa. While e dey receive the Industry Merit Award for the 12th Africa Magic Viewe...
